seo.title: Powerton Engineering - Sarrafa Masana'antu da Paneli na Sarrafa | Indiya
seo.description: Babban masana'anta na paneli na sarrafa wutar lantarki, tsarin sarrafa masana'antu da kuma hanyoyin kayan aiki. Sabis na injiniya na musamman a duk faɗin Indiya tare da gogewa fiye da shekaru 15.

seo.title: Catalog na Kayayyakin Masana'antu - Sarrafa da Kayan Lantarki | Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Catalog mai cikakke na kayayyakin sarrafa masana'antu, kayan lantarki, kayan aiki, tsarin hasken rana, famfo da kayan aiki. Kayan aiki masu inganci don amfani na masana'antu.

seo.title: Sabis na Injiniya na Ƙwararru - Shigarwa, Kulawa da Sarrafa | Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Sabis na injiniya na musamman: shirye-shiryen PLC, tsarin SCADA, sarrafa masana'antu, shigar da paneli na lantarki, kulawa, daidaitawa, hanyoyin keɓancewa da sabis na EPC na hasken rana a duk faɗin Indiya.

hero.title: Sabis na Injiniya na Ƙwararru
hero.subtitle: Cikakkun hanyoyin magance na sarrafa masana'antu, injiniyan lantarki da na'urori da aka tsara don inganta ayyukanku da ci gaba na kasuwanci.

hero.title: Ƙimar Injiniya
hero.subtitle: Samu shawarwarin injiniya na ƙwarewa da kimantawar farashin
Faɗin samfuranmu da ayyuka suna ba da maganin cikakke waɗanda ke haɓaka nasarar masana'antu, suna tabbatar da cewa kowane bangare na bukatun injiniya ana rufe su.

services.label: Ayyukanmu
services.title: Maganin kwararru don duk bukatun, da aka bayar da kulawa ta musamman
services.description: Daga sarrafa tsarota zuwa kwangilar gyara, muna ba da cikakkun maganin injiniya da suka dace da bukatun ku na masana'antu.

products.label: Kayayyakinmu
products.title: Maganin Kayan Aikin Sarrafa Masana'antu
products.description: Cikakken kewayon kayayyakin lantarki da sarrafa da aka tsara don dogara, inganci da babban aiki a mahallin masana'antu.

projects.label: Ayyukanmu
projects.title: Maganin Injiniya da aka Kai da Nasara
projects.description: Bincike tarin ayyukan da muka kammala waɗanda ke nuna gwaninta mu a sarrafa masana'antu da injiniyan lantarki.

about.label: Game da Mu
about.title: Maraba da zuwa Powerton Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
about.description: Abokin ciniki mai aminci a samar da kayayyaki da ayyukan injiniya masu inganci. An kafa shi da hangen nesa na ba da iko ga masana'antu ta hanyar sabbin abubuwa da nagarta, mun ƙware wajen samar da kayan lantarki da na'urori masu yawa.
about.visualDescription: Injiniyoyin Indiya masu ƙwararru da ke aiki akan sarrafa masana'antu da tsarin sarrafa

mechanical.title: Famfo na Inji
mechanical.description: Tsayayyen hanyoyin famfo da kayan gyara

clients.description: Mun hada kai da shugabannin masana'antu a sassa daban-daban don samar da maganganu na injiniya na musamman.
clients.testimonialsTitle: Abin da Abokan Ciniki mu ke Cewa

contact.description: A shirye kuke don fara aikin ku na gaba? Tuntuɓe ƙungiyar kwararrun mu don maganin da aka keɓanta da shawarwarin ƙwararru.

quality.description: Muna riƙe mafi girman matsayi a kowane aikin da muke bayarwa

reliability.title: Dogaro

certifications.cpriApproved: Kayan Aikin da CPRI ya Amince

about.label: Game da Mu
about.title: Maraba zuwa Powerton Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
about.description: Abokin hulɗarku mai aminci wajen ba da maganin injiniya mai kyau da ayyuka. An kafa shi da hangen nesa na ƙarfafa masana'antu ta hanyar kirkire-kirkire da nagarta, muna ƙwarewa wajen ba da nau'o-nau'o na samfuran lantarki da na'ura.
about.visualDescription: Injiniyoyin India masu ƙwarewa suna aiki akan sarrafa masana'antu da tsarin sarrafa

mechanical.title: Famfo na Inji
mechanical.description: Maganin famfo mai ɗorewa da kayayyakin gyare-gyare

projects.label: Ayyukanmu

projects.description: Bincike fayil ɗin ayyukan da muka kammala waɗanda ke nuna ƙwarewarmu a fannin sarrafa masana'antu da injiniyan lantarki.

seo.title: Powerton Engineering - Sarrafa Masana'antu da Allunan Sarrafa | India
seo.description: Babban masanin kera allunan sarrafa lantarki, tsarin sarrafa masana'antu da maganin na'ura. Ayyukan injiniya masu ƙwarewa a duk India tare da shekaru 15+ na gogewa.
seo.keywords: allunan sarrafa lantarki, sarrafa masana'antu, sarrafa tsari, na'ura, cibiyar sarrafa wutar lantarki, cibiyar sarrafa mota, injiniyan lantarki, India, Noida

hero.title: Ayyukanmu
hero.subtitle: Gano cancantar injiniyarmu ta hanyar ayyuka sama da 1200 da suka yi nasara a masana'antu daban-daban, masu nuna kirkire-kirkire, inganci da dogaro.

excellenceAward.title: Powerton Engineering Ta Sami Kyautar Nagarta a Sarrafa Masana'antu
excellenceAward.excerpt: Muna farin ciki da sanar da cewa Powerton Engineering ta sami kyautar 'Nagarta a Sarrafa Masana'antu' daga Kungiyar Injiniyoyin Indiya don masuluhisho na sabbin hanyoyin sarrafa ayyuka.

ntpcContract.title: Babban Kwangila na Sarrafa Tashar Wutar Lantarki da NTPC
ntpcContract.excerpt: Powerton Engineering ta kulla kwangila mai muhimmanci na ₹5 crore da NTPC don sarrafa sabuwar tashar wutar lantarki a Gujarat, da za ta kammala a Q3 2025.

renewableExpansion.title: Fadada Masuluhisho na Sarrafa Makamashi Mai Sabuntawa
renewableExpansion.excerpt: A matsayin wani bangare na tsarin girman kasuwancinmu, muna fadada hidimominmu da suka hada da masuluhisho na sarrafa don ayyukan hasken rana da makamashi daga iska, da ke nufin yawan bukatun makamashi mai sabuntawa na Indiya.

custom.title: Kuna Bukatar Portfolio na Musamman?
custom.description: Kuna neman takamaiman bayani game da aiki ko portfolio na musamman don masana'antu ku? Tuntuɓi ƙungiyarmu don samun takamaiman takaddun.

disclaimer.text: Takaddun portfolio ana ba da su don dalilai na bayani. Don samun sabbin bayanai da takamaiman bayanan aiki, da fatan za ku tuntuɓi ƙungiyarmu kai tsaye. Wasu bayanan aiki na iya zama sirri kuma ana samun su ne kawai ta yarjejeniya ta ɓoyewa.

alert.contactMessage: Don samun damar zuwa takaddun portfolio, da fatan za ku tuntuɓe mu kai tsaye a info@powertonengineering.com ko kira +91-94627-71662.

seo.title: Nemi Bayanin Farashi - Powerton Engineering | Masuluhisho na Sarrafa Masana'antu
seo.description: Sami bayanin farashi mai dalla-dalla don aikin sarrafa masana'antu daga Powerton Engineering. Shawarwari kyauta da amsawa cikin sa'o'i 24-48.

method.title: Zaɓi Hanyar Bayanin Farashi
method.description: Sami ƙididdigar farashi nan take tare da na'urar ƙididdigawa ko nemi bayanin farashi mai zurfi daga ƙungiyar injiniyoyinmu.

calculator.title: Na'urar Ƙididdigar Farashi Mai Ci Gaba
calculator.description: Muna sanya tabanin ƙarshe akan na'urar ƙididdigar farashi mai hankali. Wannan fasalin zai ba da farashin kai tsaye da daidaita don ayyukan sarrafa ku.
